case_title: BERMUDEZ ZENAIDA M VS MURRAY WADE et al

docket_entries.description: POS FILED ON SUBPOENA TO ANTONIO R. TREJOS.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY BERMUDEZ ZENAIDA M AS TO DEFENDANT MURRAY WADE CHESTERFIELD ANNE M ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-08-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
POS FILED ON SUBPOENA TO ZENAIDA CAMPLIS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERMUDEZ ZENAIDA M RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHESTERFIELD ANNE M $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,008.00, UNLESS SUBJECT DINING ROOM SET IS NOT DELIVERED TO PLFT BY 11/7/92 PLFT TO PICK UP THINGS ROOM SET AT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
POS FILED ON SUBPOENA TO JOSE S. BERMUDEZ JR.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MURRAY WADE CHESTERFIELD ANNE M

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERMUDEZ ZENAIDA M RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MURRAY WADE CHESTERFIELD ANNE M $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,008.00, PROVIDED HOWEVER THAT IN LIEU OF A MONEY JUDGMENT, DEFENDANT CHESTERFIELD MAY DELIVER SUBJECT DINING STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF
REFUND OF $1008.00 MAILED TO ZENAIDA BERMUDEZ RECEIPT 	7598.
